overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through an ancient Egyptian city at night. The character traverses torch-lit streets lined with palm trees and stone temples, encounters mounted soldiers, and ascends stairs into a residential courtyard area.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian ceremonial street with temple approach

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt street toward the temple complex, passing burning braziers and palm trees

notable_agents.action: civilian walking ahead on the path toward the temple complex

entered.detail: large white stone temple with tall red banner hanging from the facade
two large stone statues flanking the approach to the temple stairs
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street
metal braziers with flames providing warm orange light
traditional Egyptian buildings with flat roofs and small windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide ceremonial street in ancient Egypt at night. The protagonist walks toward a large white temple with a red banner visible in the distance, flanked by stone statues. Palm trees line the right side while burning braziers cast warm light on the dirt path. A few civilians walk ahead in the scattered crowd.

events.description: group of mounted soldiers on horses passes by from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street as mounted soldiers pass by on the right side

notable_agents.action: soldier on horseback riding past the character
civilian walking in the opposite direction along the street

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with red fabric canopies and goods
tall stone walls with mounted torch sconces

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the open street as the temple moves to the right side of the frame. A group of mounted soldiers on horses passes by from the right, creating a traffic event. Market stalls with red canopies appear on the right, and stone walls line the left. The crowd density remains sparse with pedestrians moving in opposing directions.

events.description: character turns and begins ascending stone stairs into narrower residential passage

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone staircase between residential buildings with painted walls and green trim

entered.detail: wide stone stairs ascending between residential buildings
buildings with painted walls in orange and green decorative trim
white fabric awnings and cloths hanging between buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions as the character turns to ascend a stone staircase between residential buildings. The space becomes narrow and enclosed with partial sky visibility. The buildings feature painted walls with green and orange trim. White fabrics hang overhead between structures. The area is empty of pedestrians as the character climbs the stairs.

events.description: enters covered walkway with decorated columns and hanging fabrics
lighting becomes darker as character moves into enclosed courtyard area

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered colonnade and entering the dimly lit courtyard with scattered objects

entered.detail: covered walkway with roof supported by decorated stone columns
stone columns with green and gold decorative bands and patterns
baskets of fruit and goods scattered on the ground near the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered colonnade with decorated stone columns and hanging white fabrics. The lighting shifts to artificial sources as the sky becomes no longer visible. The character proceeds into a darker courtyard area where fruit baskets and scattered goods lie on the ground near mud brick walls. The space is enclosed and empty of other people.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, torch-lit ceremonial street into the enclosed, shadowed depths of a residential courtyard. It begins with the protagonist walking toward a distant white temple and red banner, flanked by stone statues and palm trees under the warm glow of burning braziers. As the character continues forward, the temple shifts to the side and the open path becomes a bustling thoroughfare where mounted soldiers pass by market stalls with red canopies. The scene then narrows as the camera turns to ascend a stone staircase between residential buildings with painted trim and overhead fabrics, leaving the crowds behind. Finally, the movement leads into a semi-covered colonnade of decorated columns before entering a dark, secluded courtyard filled with scattered fruit baskets and mud brick walls.
